subject: IBPS PO Prelims Previous Year Paper 2023
message: Generated questions based on the uploaded IBPS PO Prelims 2023 PDF.

questions.question: According to the passage, why did emissions of carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases plunge in 2020?

options.a: Due to a permanent shift in industrial policies.
options.b: Because of lockdowns that restricted mobility and economic activity.
options.c: Due to a sudden decrease in the world population.
options.d: Because of a global ban on fossil fuels.

questions.question: In the following question, a sentence is given with a phrase highlighted in bold. Which of the phrases should replace it to make the sentence grammatically correct?
A certain amount was invested in a scheme at 10% per annum compound interest for 2 years. If the interest earned was Rs. 420, find the principal amount.
What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the following number series? 5, 6, 14, 45, ?, 925
If 'A' sits third to the right of 'B' and 'B' sits at one of the extreme ends, how many people are sitting in the row if the total length is 8 people?
What is the shortest distance between Point G and Point F according to the given directions?
The person who travels to Assam travels in which of the following months?
